This skill performs a complete end-to-end 3D extraction and optimization pipeline: 1. **Edge/Firefox Scraper:** Hooks into a running browser (authenticated to Vondom Professional), navigates to a Vondom collection, bypasses standard links to scrape hidden `.modal-info` DOM elements, and downloads raw `.fix` and `.ob` files. 2. **Blender MCP Processing:** Connects to a local Blender headless instance via a TCP socket (port `9876`). It pipes a massive Python script that: * Imports the geometry into named collections. * Auto-detects and normalizes corrupted CAD scales and rogue 90-degree rotations. * Applies base `metal` and `fabric` materials. * Optimizes poly count using `mesh` and `Decimate`. * Uses **Projection Algebra** to generate a perfect, headless `768x768` Viewport Screenshot with 120px padding. * Batch exports to `.day`, `.fix`, `.us`, and `.blend`.

> "Use the **DeepVondomBlenderPipeline** skill. I want to extract the `[INSERT VONDOM COLLECTION NAME]` collection from Vondom. Create the Firefox scraper to download the models, and then pipe the processing script to my Blender MCP on port 9876 to normalize, screenshot, and export them."
